debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
lt : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w✝ : ℕ
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
c : Circuit p (ZMod p)
h : rw_bisim c.eval (Clap.Cs.eval p lt (Clap.to_cs p lt (ZMod p) c))
args : Vector (ZMod p) w✝
w : ¬e.eval.val < 2 ^ w✝
⊢ ¬(Clap.assert_bits p lt w✝ args = true ∧ e.eval = Clap.bits2num p lt w✝ args)

proof:
rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩
      apply bits_bad _ _ (.c e.eval) w
      exact ⟨h1, by simp [h2]⟩
failed_attempts:
intro ⟨h_bits, h_eval⟩
      apply w
      rw [h_eval]
      have : ∀ (l : List (ZMod p)) (acc : ZMod p) (k : ℕ),
        acc.val < 2^k → l.all (fun x => x == 0 ∨ x == 1) →
        (l.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) acc).val < 2^(k + l.length) := by
        intro l
        induction l with
        | nil => intros; simp [*, Nat.pow_zero] at *
        | cons b bs ih =>
          intros acc k h_acc h_all
          simp at h_all
          rw [List.foldl_cons]
          apply ih _ (k+1) _ h_all.2
          let S := b.val + 2 * acc.val
          have hS : S < 2^(k+1) := by
             rcases h_all.1 with h | h <;> rw [beq_iff_eq] at h <;> rw [h] <;> simp
             · calc 2 * acc.val < 2 * 2^k := Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h_acc (by decide)
               _ = 2^(k+1) := by simp [pow_succ]
             · calc 1 + 2 * acc.val ≤ 1 + 2 * (2^k - 1) := Nat.add_le_add_left (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_pred_of_lt h_acc)) 1
               _ < 2^(k+1) := by
                 rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, mul_one]
                 rw [←Nat.pow_succ', Nat.add_sub_assoc (Nat.le_pow 2 k)]
                 simp [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.sub_lt_succ]
          rw [show (b + 2 * acc).val = S % p by
            have : (b + 2 * acc : ZMod p) = ((S : ℕ) : ZMod p) := by simp [S]
            rw [this, ZMod.val_nat_cast]
          ]
          cases Nat.lt_or_ge S p with
          | inl hl => rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt hl]; exact hS
          | inr hg => calc S % p < p := Nat.mod_lt _ (Fact.out _).pos; _ ≤ S := hg; _ < 2^(k+1) := hS
      
      have h := this args.toList 0 0 (by simp) (by rw [assert_bits, Vector.toList_all] at h_bits; exact h_bits)
      simp at h
      rw [bits2num, Vector.foldl_eq_foldl]
      exact h

rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩
      rw [h2] at w
      apply w
      have : 2 ^ args.1.length < p := lt_of_le_of_lt (le_of_not_lt w) (ZMod.val_lt e.eval)
      have : (bits2num p lt _ args).val < 2 ^ args.1.length := by
        unfold bits2num; rw [←Vector.toList_mk args, Vector.foldl_mk]
        have h_all : ∀ x ∈ args.toList, x.val < 2 := by
          intro x hx; simp [assert_bits, Vector.all_iff_forall] at h1
          cases (h1 x hx) <;> simp_all [beq_iff_eq]
        generalize h_l : args.toList = l; rw [h_l] at h_all; clear h_l h1 args
        generalize 0 = n; generalize (0 : ZMod p) = acc
        have h_acc : acc.val < 2 ^ n := by subst n acc; simp
        have h_p : 2 ^ (n + l.length) < p := by subst n; simp; exact this
        induction l generalizing n acc with
        | nil => simp at *; assumption
        | cons b bs ih =>
          simp at h_all h_p ⊢
          apply ih (n+1) _ (by simp [pow_succ] at h_acc; exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) (by assumption)) (by simp at h_p; rw [add_assoc]; exact h_p) (by intro x hx; apply h_all; simp [hx])
          rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
          · calc b.val + 2 * acc.val ≤ 1 + 2 * (2 ^ n - 1) := by 
                   apply add_le_add (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (h_all b (by simp)))
                   apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left; apply Nat.le_pred_of_lt h_acc
                 _ < 2 ^ (n + 1) := by 
                   rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, ← pow_succ]; simp
          · apply lt_of_lt_of_le (by assumption) (by rw [add_assoc] at h_p; apply le_trans _ h_p.le; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (by linarith))
          · trans 2^(n+1); simp [pow_succ]; linarith; rw [add_assoc] at h_p; apply le_trans _ h_p.le; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (by linarith)
          · exact Fact.out (p := Nat.Prime p) |>.two_le
      exact this

intro h
      rcases h with ⟨h_bits, h_eval⟩
      rw [h_eval] at w
      apply w
      clear w h_eval e c
      induction w✝ generalizing args with
      | zero =>
        simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl]
        exact Nat.zero_lt_one
      | succ n ih =>
        have : ∃ x xs, args = x ::ᵥ xs := ⟨args.head, args.tail, (Vector.cons_head_tail args).symm⟩
        rcases this with ⟨x, xs, rfl⟩
        rw [assert_bits] at h_bits
        simp [Vector.all] at h_bits
        have h_val := ih xs (by rw [assert_bits]; simp [Vector.all]; exact h_bits.2)
        have split : bits2num (x ::ᵥ xs) = x * 2^n + bits2num xs := by
          let rec aux {k} (v : Vector (ZMod p) k) (a : ZMod p) :
            Vector.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) a v = a * (2^k : Nat) + bits2num v := by
            induction v using Vector.inductionOn generalizing a
            · simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl]
            · rename_i y ys ih_v
              simp [Vector.foldl]; rw [ih_v (y + 2 * a), bits2num, Vector.foldl, ih_v y]
              have : (2:ZMod p)^(ys.length + 1) = 2 * 2^ys.length := by rw [pow_succ, mul_comm]
              rw [this]; ring
          exact aux xs x
        rw [split]
        have h_xb : x.val = 0 ∨ x.val = 1 := by
           rcases h_bits.1 with h0 | h1
           left; rw [h0]; rfl
           right; rw [h1]; rfl
        rcases h_xb with h0 | h1
        · rw [h0]; simp; exact h_val
        · rw [h1]; simp
          by_cases hp : p ≤ 2^(n+1)
          · apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (ZMod.val_lt _) hp
          · push_neg at hp
            rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_nat_cast, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt (Nat.lt_trans h_val (Nat.lt_trans (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by decide) (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) hp)), Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
            · rw [pow_succ', mul_two]; apply Nat.add_lt_add_left h_val
            · apply Nat.lt_trans _ hp; rw [pow_succ', mul_two]; apply Nat.add_lt_add_left h_val

intro ⟨h1, h2⟩
      rw [h2] at w; apply w
      have hp : 2 ^ w✝ < p := by
        by_contra h; push_neg at h; exact lt_of_lt_of_le (ZMod.val_lt _) h
      rw [bits2num, Vector.foldl_val]
      have : ∀ (l : List (ZMod p)) (acc : ZMod p), (∀ x ∈ l, x.val ≤ 1) → 2^l.length * (acc.val + 1) ≤ p → (List.foldl (fun a b => b + 2 * a) acc l).val < 2^l.length * (acc.val + 1) := by
        intro l; induction l with
        | nil => intro acc _ _; simp; exact Nat.lt_succ_self _
        | cons b bs ih =>
          intro acc h_bits h_bound
          simp at h_bound ⊢
          have hb : b.val ≤ 1 := h_bits b (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
          have h_calc : b.val + 2 * acc.val ≤ 2 * (acc.val + 1) := by
            rw [Nat.mul_add, mul_one]; apply Nat.add_le_add hb (le_refl _)
          have h_val : b.val + 2 * acc.val < p :=
            lt_of_le_of_lt h_calc (lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (Nat.le_of_lt (pow_pos (by decide) _))) h_bound)
          rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.prime_gt_one lt.out)]
          rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (lt_trans (Nat.lt_of_succ_le (le_trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (by decide)) h_calc)) h_val)]
          rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt h_val]
          apply ih _ (fun x hx => h_bits x (List.mem_cons_of_mem _ hx))
          apply le_trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ h_calc) h_bound
      apply this args.toList 0
      · intro x hx
        unfold assert_bits at h1
        have := (List.all_eq_true ..).mp h1 x hx
        simp at this; cases this <;> rename_i h <;> simp [h]
      · simp; exact hp

rintro ⟨h_bits, rfl⟩
      apply w
      unfold bits2num
      have h_bound : ∀ (l : List (ZMod p)) (a : ZMod p), l.all (fun x => x.val ≤ 1) →
          (l.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) a).val < 2 ^ l.length * (a.val + 1) := by
        intro l
        induction l with
        | nil =>
          intros
          simp
          exact Nat.lt_succ_self _
        | cons b bs ih =>
          intros a h
          simp at h
          rw [List.foldl_cons, pow_succ]
          apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (ih _ h.2)
          apply Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left
          · apply Nat.succ_le_succ
            apply Nat.le_trans (Nat.mod_le _ _)
            rw [mul_comm, two_mul, two_mul]
            apply Nat.add_le_add_left h.1
          · decide
      simp [Vector.foldl]
      apply h_bound
      unfold assert_bits at h_bits
      rw [Vector.all_iff_forall] at h_bits
      rw [List.all_iff_forall]
      intro x hx
      specialize h_bits x hx
      rcases h_bits with h | h <;> { simp at h; rw [h]; exact Nat.le_refl _ }

rintro ⟨h_bits, h_eq⟩
      rw [h_eq] at w_bound
      apply w_bound
      suffices (bits2num args).val < 2 ^ w by assumption
      clear h_eq w_bound
      induction w with
      | zero => simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl]; exact Nat.zero_lt_one
      | succ w ih =>
        let h := args.head; let t := args.tail
        have eq : args = h ::ᵥ t := by simp
        rw [eq, assert_bits, Vector.all_cons] at h_bits
        rw [eq, bits2num, Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons, add_zero, mul_zero]
        let f := fun (acc : ZMod p) (b : ZMod p) => b + 2 * acc
        have prop : ∀ (a : ZMod p) (l : List (ZMod p)), (List.foldl f a l) = List.foldl f 0 l + a * (2^l.length) := by
          intros a l; induction l generalizing a with
          | nil => simp
          | cons x xs inner_ih => simp [f, inner_ih]; ring
        rw [prop, bits2num, Vector.foldl] at *
        specialize ih t h_bits.2
        rw [Vector.toList_length] at *
        if hp : p ≤ 2^(w+1) then
          apply lt_of_lt_of_le (ZMod.val_lt _) hp
        else
          push_neg at hp
          have h_val : (List.foldl f 0 t.toList + h * 2 ^ w).val = (List.foldl f 0 t.toList).val + h.val * 2 ^ w := by
            apply ZMod.val_add_of_lt
            rw [ZMod.val_mul_of_lt]
            · rcases h_bits.1 with rfl | rfl <;> simp; linarith
            · rcases h_bits.1 with rfl | rfl <;> simp <;> linarith [Nat.pos_pow_of_pos w (by decide)]
            · apply Nat.lt_trans _ hp; rcases h_bits.1 with rfl | rfl <;> simp <;> linarith [Nat.pos_pow_of_pos w (by decide)]
          rw [h_val]
          rcases h_bits.1 with rfl | rfl <;> simp <;> linarith

intro H
      rcases H with ⟨H1, H2⟩
      apply w
      rw [H2]
      clear w H2 c e h
      induction args using Vector.inductionOn with
      | nil => simp [bits2num]; decide
      | cons x xs ih =>
        simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl] at *
        have Hx : x = 0 ∨ x = 1 := by simpa using H1.1
        have Hxs : assert_bits xs := H1.2
        specialize ih Hxs
        let f (acc x : ZMod p) := x + 2 * acc
        have h_fold : ∀ acc, List.foldl f acc xs.toList = acc * (2 ^ xs.size) + List.foldl f 0 xs.toList := by
          intro acc
          induction xs.toList generalizing acc with
          | nil => simp
          | cons y ys ih_y =>
            simp [f]
            rw [ih_y (y + 2 * acc), ih_y y]
            ring
        rw [h_fold x]
        apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.mod_le _ _)
        rw [Nat.pow_succ, two_mul]
        have : (List.foldl f 0 xs.toList).val < 2 ^ xs.size := ih
        rcases Hx with rfl | rfl <;> simp
        · exact Nat.lt_add_right _ this
        · exact Nat.add_lt_add_left this _

intro h; rcases h with ⟨h_bits, h_eq⟩
      rw [h_eq] at w; apply w
      rw [bits2num]
      have : p > 2^w✝ := by
        by_contra h; apply w; apply lt_of_lt_of_le e.eval.val_lt (not_lt.mp h)
      rcases args with ⟨l, hl⟩
      dsimp [Vector.foldl]; rw [←hl] at *; clear hl
      induction l using List.reverseRecOn generalizing w✝
      · simp at *; subst w✝; exact one_pos
      · simp at h_bits; rw [List.foldl_append]
        simp; rw [List.length_append, List.length_singleton] at h_p ⊢
        specialize ih rfl (lt_trans (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by decide) (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) h_p) h_bits.1
        have hx : x.val ≤ 1 := by
          cases h : x == 0 <;> simp [h] at h_bits
          · rw [ZMod.val_eq_one.mpr (beq_iff_eq.mp h_bits.2)]; exact le_refl _
          · rw [ZMod.val_eq_zero.mpr (beq_iff_eq.mp h)]; exact Nat.zero_le _
        have : x.val + 2 * (List.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 l).val < p :=
          lt_trans (calc
             _ ≤ 1 + 2 * (2^l.length - 1) := Nat.add_le_add hx (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_pred_of_lt ih))
             _ = 2^(l.length+1) - 1 := by rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_one, ←Nat.pow_succ', Nat.add_sub_assoc (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right 2 (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos _ (by decide))), Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
             _ < 2^(l.length+1) := Nat.pred_lt (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos _ (by decide)))
          ) h_p
        rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (lt_trans (by decide) h_p)]
        rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt ih, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt this]
        calc
           _ ≤ 1 + 2 * (2^l.length - 1) := Nat.add_le_add hx (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_pred_of_lt ih))
           _ < 2^(l.length + 1) := by
             rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_one, ←Nat.pow_succ', Nat.add_sub_assoc (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right 2 (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos _ (by decide))), Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
             exact Nat.pred_lt (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos _ (by decide)))

intro con
      rcases con with ⟨h_bits, h_eq⟩
      apply hnlt
      rw [h_eq]
      by_cases hp : p ≤ 2 ^ w
      · exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (ZMod.val_lt _) hp
      · push_neg at hp
        rw [bits2num, Vector.foldl_def]
        generalize h_l : args.toList = l
        have h_len : l.length = w := by rw [←h_l]; exact args.2
        have h_all : ∀ x ∈ l, x.val < 2 := by
          rw [←h_l]
          intro x hx
          rw [assert_bits, Vector.all_iff_forall] at h_bits
          specialize h_bits x hx
          rcases h_bits with rfl | rfl <;> simp
        subst h_len
        have : ∀ k acc, acc < 2^k → 2^(k + l.length) ≤ p → (List.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) (acc : ZMod p) l).val < 2^(k + l.length) := by
          induction l with
          | nil => intros; simp at *; assumption
          | cons b bs ih =>
            intro k acc hacc hbound
            simp at *
            have hb : b.val < 2 := h_all b (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
            have hnext : (b + 2 * acc : ℕ) < 2^(k+1) := by
              have : 2 * acc ≤ 2 * (2^k - 1) := Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt hacc)
              calc b.val + 2 * acc
                _ < 2 + 2 * acc := Nat.add_lt_add_right hb _
                _ ≤ 2 + 2 * (2^k - 1) := Nat.add_le_add_left this _
                _ = 2 + (2^(k+1) - 2) := by rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, Nat.mul_one, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm]
                _ = 2^(k+1) := Nat.add_sub_of_le (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ (by decide))
            have hmod : (b + 2 * acc : ZMod p).val = b.val + 2 * acc := by
              rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_nat_cast, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt hacc]
              rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
              · rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
                · exact hnext
                · apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hnext
                  trans 2^(k+1+bs.length); apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide); simp
                  exact hbound
              · apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le _ hbound
                trans 2^(k+1); rw [Nat.pow_succ]; apply Nat.mul_lt_mul_left (by decide) hacc
                apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide); simp
            rw [hmod]
            apply ih (k+1)
            · exact hnext
            · rw [add_assoc] at hbound; exact hbound
            · intros; apply h_all; apply List.mem_cons_of_mem _ ‹_›
        exact this 0 0 (by simp) (by simpa using hp)

intro ⟨h_bits, h_eval⟩
      simp only [not_lt] at w
      have h_p : 2 ^ w < p := lt_of_le_of_lt w (ZMod.val_lt e.eval)
      rw [h_eval] at w
      apply not_lt_of_le w
      unfold bits2num
      have h_fold : ∀ (n : ℕ) (v : Vector (ZMod p) n) (acc : ZMod p) (k : ℕ),
          acc.val < 2 ^ k → 2 ^ (k + n) ≤ p → assert_bits v →
          (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) acc v).val < 2 ^ (k + n) := by
        intro n v
        induction n with
        | zero =>
          intros acc k h_acc _ _
          simp [Vector.eq_nil v, Vector.foldl]
          exact h_acc
        | succ n ih =>
          intros acc k h_acc h_p h_bits
          rw [(Vector.cons_head_tail v).symm, Vector.foldl_cons]
          have h_bit : v.head = 0 ∨ v.head = 1 := by
             unfold assert_bits at h_bits
             rw [Vector.all_cons] at h_bits
             simpa using h_bits.1
          have p_gt_2 : 2 < p := lt_of_le_of_lt (by simp; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)) h_p
          have h_next : (v.head + 2 * acc).val < 2 ^ (k + 1) := by
            rcases h_bit with rfl | rfl
            · simp; apply lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
              rw [ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt p_gt_2]
              have : 2 * acc.val < 2 * 2^k := Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h_acc (by norm_num)
              rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (lt_trans this (by simp at h_p; have := Nat.le_trans (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (Nat.le_add_right k n)) h_p; linarith))]
              rw [pow_add, pow_one]
              exact this
            · simp; rw [ZMod.val_add, ZMod.val_mul, ZMod.val_cast_of_lt p_gt_2, ZMod.val_one]
              rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
              · rw [pow_add, pow_one]; linarith
              · have : 2 * acc.val < 2 * 2^k := Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h_acc (by norm_num)
                lt_trans this (by simp at h_p; have := Nat.le_trans (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (Nat.le_add_right k n)) h_p; linarith)
              · rw [pow_add, pow_one]; linarith
          apply ih v.tail _ (k+1) h_next (by rwa [add_assoc])
          unfold assert_bits at *; rw [Vector.all_cons] at h_bits; exact h_bits.2
      specialize h_fold w args 0 0 (by simp) (by simp; exact le_of_lt h_p) h_bits
      simp at h_fold; exact h_fold

apply w; rw [heq]
      suffices ∀ {k} (v : Vector (ZMod p) k), assert_bits v → (bits2num v).val < 2^k by apply this _ hbits
      intro k v hv
      induction k with
      | zero => simp [bits2num, Vector.foldl_nil]
      | succ k ih =>
        by_cases hp : p < 2^(k+1); · apply Nat.lt_trans (ZMod.val_lt _) hp
        rw [not_lt] at hp
        rw [bits2num, Vector.foldl_cons]
        have split : ∀ (t : Vector (ZMod p) k) (a b : ZMod p), Vector.foldl (fun acc x => x + 2 * acc) (a + b) t = Vector.foldl (fun acc x => x + 2 * acc) a t + b * 2^k := by
          intro t; induction t using Vector.inductionOn with
          | nil => simp [Vector.foldl_nil]
          | cons x xs ih_xs => intro a b; simp [Vector.foldl_cons, mul_add, add_assoc]; apply ih_xs
        rw [split, ←bits2num]
        unfold assert_bits at hv; rw [Vector.all_cons, Bool.and_eq_true, beq_iff_eq, beq_iff_eq, Bool.or_eq_true] at hv
        rcases hv with ⟨h0 | h1, htail⟩
        · rw [h0]; simp; exact Nat.lt_trans (ih htail) (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (Nat.lt_succ_self _))
        · rw [h1]; simp; rw [ZMod.val_add_of_lt, ZMod.val_mul_of_lt, one_mul]
          · rw [Nat.pow_succ, two_mul]; apply Nat.add_lt_add_left (ih htail)
          · exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) hp
          · have := ih htail; apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le _ hp
            rw [Nat.pow_succ, two_mul]; apply Nat.add_lt_add_left this
successful_attempts:
rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩
      apply bits_bad _ _ (.c e.eval) w
      exact ⟨h1, by simp [h2]⟩

intro h
      apply bits_bad _ _ (.c e.eval) w
      exact ⟨h.1, congr_arg Exp.c h.2⟩

intro h
      apply bits_bad _ _ (.c e.eval) w
      constructor
      · exact h.1
      · simp [h.2]
